text:
Looks fine, please proceed with update.

On 28.06.12 07:01 , Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/pecl-libevent,
>
> Please note that PR ports/169507 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169507
>
